category_sources: source_facts.description describes Oak as an expressive, simple, dynamic programming language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oak; official homepage title is Oak.
docs_sources: Official Oak homepage says official documentation will be available when the language is more finished; official standard library documentation is available at oaklang.org/lib/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated in the input, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a dynamic programming language; official homepage says the oak command ships an interpreter, standard library, formatter, bundler, compiler, test runner, and documentation tool.
